text: Senior Iranian official Mohsen Rezaee: We will not tolerate a naval blockade. If the blockade continues, Iran will respond.
text_zh: 伊朗高级官员穆赫辛·雷扎伊：我们不会容忍海上封锁。如果封锁继续，伊朗将予以回击。

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Brent crude oil price up 8%, hits $120. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：布伦特原油价格上涨8%，达到120美元。推文

text: The Spectator Index Meta share price down over 5% despite beating revenue expectations. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2049589036587917795/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index Meta股价尽管营收超出预期，但仍下跌超过5%。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2049589036587917795/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Andriy Kovalenko, head of the Center for Countering Disinformation, stated that Putin is worried about the May 9th parade and has therefore decided to propose a truce. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049589020192096342/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 反虚假信息中心负责人安德里·科瓦连科表示，普京担心5月9日的阅兵式，因此决定提议停火。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049589020192096342/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Putin and Trump held a phone call that lasted an hour and a half. The Russian dictator told the U.S. President that he is ready to declare a "truce" for Victory Day. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049585596213948719/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 普京与特朗普进行了长达一个半小时的通话。这位俄罗斯独裁者告诉美国总统，他准备为胜利日宣布“停火”。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049585596213948719/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 It’s about to go down. Gaza flotilla organizers say several fast military boats identifying themselves as Israel approached the vessels, aimed lasers and weapons, ordered passengers to move forward and raise their hands. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯 🔴 情况即将恶化。加沙船队组织者称，几艘自称是以色列的快速军舰靠近了船只，用激光和武器瞄准，命令乘客向前移动并举起双手。推文

text: Open Source Intel Met police kicking in a terrorists head isn’t something you see everyday https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049584627073843696/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伦敦警察踢恐怖分子的头可不是每天都能看到的场景 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049584627073843696/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JD Vance: "Political violence is coming largely from one side of the aisle. The president has now faced three serious attempts on his life ... " https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049583186842124783/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel JD·万斯：“政治暴力主要来自党派的一方。总统现在已经面临三次严重的暗杀企图……” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049583186842124783/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hakeem Jeffries reacted angrily after the Supreme Court ruling, saying: “Affirmative action is gone. Diversity is gone. Equity gone. Inclusion gone… Voting Rights Act, largely gone.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049582500641411118/video/1 The Supreme Court just struck down Louisiana’s majority-Black congressional district 6-3, gutting a key section of the Voting Rights Act. That law used to let courts force states to draw districts where Black and minority voters had real power. No more. States across the South can now redraw maps. Fewer minority-friendly districts means fewer safe Democrat seats. One nonprofit report estimated that overhauling the Voting Rights Act this way could swing approximately 12 Democratic-held House seats to Republicans. Republicans hold a slim House majority heading into the 2026 midterms. This ruling just made keeping it a lot easier. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈基姆·杰弗里斯在最高法院裁决后愤怒回应，称：“平权行动没了。多元化没了。公平没了。包容没了……《投票权法案》基本也没了。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049582500641411118/video/1 最高法院刚刚以6比3的投票结果推翻了路易斯安那州的黑人多数国会选区，削弱了《投票权法案》的关键部分。该法律过去允许法院强制各州划分黑人和少数族裔选民拥有真正权力的选区。现在不行了。南方各州现在可以重新划分地图。对少数族裔友好的选区减少意味着民主党的安全席位减少。一份非营利组织报告估计，以这种方式彻底改革《投票权法案》可能会使大约12个民主党控制的众议院席位转向共和党。共和党在进入2026年中期选举时在众议院拥有微弱多数。这一裁决使他们更容易保持多数席位。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: WarTranslated "We hope to be able to welcome home in the near future the Ukrainians who are currently in captivity in Russia and in the temporarily occupied territory. We remember all of our people who are still in Russian captivity: both the military and civilians." - Zelenskyy. The President stated that the Coordination Headquarters has processed the documents and lists necessary for the exchange, and that communication with the Russian side regarding these specific humanitarian issues is ongoing. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated “我们希望在不久的将来能够欢迎目前在俄罗斯和临时占领区被俘的乌克兰人回家。我们铭记所有仍在俄罗斯被俘的同胞：无论是军人还是平民。” - 泽连斯基。总统表示，协调总部已经处理了交换所需的文件和名单，并且正在就这些具体的人道主义问题与俄方进行沟通。推文

text: Iranian Navy Chief: Soon, we’ll reveal a weapon they deeply fear—right on their doorstep. Hope it doesn’t give them a heart attack!
text_zh: 伊朗海军司令：很快，我们将展示一种他们深感恐惧的武器——就在他们的家门口。希望这不会让他们心脏病发作！

text: BREAKING: Israeli Navy starts intercepting Gaza-bound flotilla. Crew ordered to kneel; communications jammed, SOS sent, drones overhead.
text_zh: 快讯：以色列海军开始拦截前往加沙的船队。船员被命令跪下；通讯被干扰，发出了求救信号，无人机在头顶盘旋。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Israeli Army Radio: This is the Israeli Navys farthest operation to date in intercepting a Gaza‑bound flotilla, stopping it hundreds of kilometres off Israel’s coast near Crete. It is the third such interception since the start of the war. An Israeli…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The activists on board the flotilla have started wearing their life vests. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 以色列陆军电台：这是以色列海军迄今为止拦截前往加沙船队的最远行动，在距离以色列海岸数百公里的克里特岛附近将其拦截。这是自战争开始以来的第三次此类拦截。一位以色列官员表示……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 船队上的活动人士已经开始穿上救生衣。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 IDF Radio: The Israeli Navy has so far taken control of 7 out of 58 vessels. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli Army Radio: This is the Israeli Navys farthest operation to date in intercepting a Gaza‑bound flotilla, stopping it hundreds of kilometres off Israel’s coast near Crete. It is the third such interception since the start of the war. An Israeli official said: “This time we decided to surprise them at a great distance – due to the size of the flotilla.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 以色列国防军电台：以色列海军目前已控制了58艘船只中的7艘。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列陆军电台：这是以色列海军迄今为止拦截前往加沙船队的最远行动，在距离以色列海岸数百公里的克里特岛附近将其拦截。这是自战争开始以来的第三次此类拦截。一位以色列官员表示：“这次我们决定在很远的距离给他们一个惊喜——因为船队的规模很大。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Kan also confirms the report that the Israeli Navy has started to intercept the flotilla. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 IDF Radio: The Israeli Navy has so far taken control of 7 out of 58 vessels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Kan 也证实了以色列海军已开始拦截船队的报道。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列国防军电台：以色列海军目前已控制了 58 艘船只中的 7 艘。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Israeli Channel 14: The Israeli Navy has begun boarding the Gaza‑bound flotilla, enforcing the naval security blockade on the Gaza Strip. The military is prepared for any scenario. The incident has been referred to the Foreign Ministry. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Kan also confirms the report that the Israeli Navy has started to intercept the flotilla. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 以色列第 14 频道：以色列海军已开始登上一支前往加沙的船队，执行对加沙地带的海上安全封锁。军方已为任何情况做好准备。该事件已移交外交部处理。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Kan 也证实了以色列海军已开始拦截船队的报道。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Footage showcasing the maritime broadcast by the IDF ordering the vessels to go back. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli Channel 14: The Israeli Navy has begun boarding the Gaza‑bound flotilla, enforcing the naval security blockade on the Gaza Strip. The military is prepared for any scenario. The incident has been referred to the Foreign Ministry. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 展示以色列国防军海上广播命令船只返回的视频片段。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列第 14 频道：以色列海军已开始登上一支前往加沙的船队，执行对加沙地带的海上安全封锁。军方已为任何情况做好准备。该事件已移交外交部处理。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Footage showcases a alleged Israeli frigate approaching the Flotilla. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Footage showcasing the maritime broadcast by the IDF ordering the vessels to go back. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 展示一艘据称是以色列护卫舰接近船队的视频片段。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 展示以色列国防军海上广播命令船只返回的视频片段。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 The flotilla, carrying unarmed civilians and essential aid to Gaza, reports being surrounded by Israeli military speedboats pointing lasers and guns. Participants say the boats self‑identified as Israeli, with crews pointing semi‑automatic weapons…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Footage showcases a alleged Israeli frigate approaching the Flotilla. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 载有手无寸铁的平民和运往加沙的基本援助物资的船队报告称，他们被以色列军用快艇包围，快艇用激光和枪支指向他们。参与者称，这些船只自称是以色列船只，船员们用半自动武器指向他们……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 展示一艘据称是以色列护卫舰接近船队的视频片段。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The flotilla, carrying unarmed civilians and essential aid to Gaza, reports being surrounded by Israeli military speedboats pointing lasers and guns. Participants say the boats self‑identified as Israeli, with crews pointing semi‑automatic weapons and ordering people to the front of the boats and onto their hands and knees. They claim that communications are being jammed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 载有非武装平民和必要援助物资前往加沙的船队报告称，被以色列军用快艇包围，对方用激光和枪支指向他们。参与者称，这些船只自称为以色列船只，船员用半自动武器指向他们，并命令船上人员到船头跪下。他们声称通讯受到干扰。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇷🇮🇱🇵🇸 Global Sumud Flotilla has announced that its fleet was approached by military speedboats that “self‑identified as ‘Israel’”. Earlier reports from participants had implied the intercepting vessels were Greek. The flotilla is seeking to bring humanitarian…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Multiple journalists on board the flotilla confirmed that they were intercepted and surrounded by several drones and vessels of unknown origin. Adding that that have activated security protocols. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇷🇮🇱🇵🇸 全球坚韧船队（Global Sumud Flotilla）宣布，其船队遭到军用快艇靠近，这些快艇‘自称为以色列’。此前参与者的报告曾暗示拦截船只是希腊的。该船队旨在运送人道主义……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 船队上的多名记者证实，他们被几架无人机和不明来源的船只拦截并包围。并补充说他们已经启动了安全协议。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇷🇵🇸🇮🇱 Footage showcases the interception of one of the Gaza Flotilla vessels. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Global Sumud Flotilla has announced that its fleet was approached by military speedboats that “self‑identified as ‘Israel’”. Earlier reports from participants had implied the intercepting vessels were Greek. The flotilla is seeking to bring humanitarian aid to Gaza and has described the interception as illegal, claiming the vessels are in international waters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇷🇵🇸🇮🇱 视频展示了加沙船队其中一艘船只被拦截的画面。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 全球坚韧船队宣布，其船队遭到军用快艇靠近，这些快艇“自称为以色列”。此前参与者的报告曾暗示拦截船只是希腊的。该船队旨在向加沙运送人道主义援助，并将此次拦截描述为非法，声称这些船只位于国际水域。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇷🇵🇸 Greek authorities fired warning shots from an airgun as they approached vessels of the Global Sumud Flotilla, which is seeking to bring humanitarian aid to Gaza, according to a flotilla participant on livestream. Activists on board stated that the…" ⚡️ 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Footage showcases the interception of one of the Gaza Flotilla vessels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇷🇵🇸 据船队的一名直播参与者称，希腊当局在接近全球坚韧船队（旨在向加沙运送人道主义援助）的船只时，用气枪发射了警告弹。船上的活动人士称……” ⚡️ 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 视频展示了加沙船队其中一艘船只被拦截的画面。 @wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index Alphabet share price surges by over 5% after beating expectations and reporting $109.9 billion in revenue for Q1 2026. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index Alphabet 股价在超出预期并报告 2026 年第一季度营收为 1099 亿美元后飙升超过 5%。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Walmart opens third U.S. milk processing facility with $350 million investment — Reuters https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049577089393701256/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 沃尔玛投资 3.5 亿美元开设第三家美国牛奶加工厂 — 路透社 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049577089393701256/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel US President Trump: "I had a long talk with President Putin. I've suggested a little bit of a ceasefire [in Ukraine] and I think he might do that. He might announce something having to do with that. Did he announce it yet?" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049576600895684746/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统特朗普：“我和普京总统进行了长时间的交谈。我建议在[乌克兰]进行一点停火，我认为他可能会这样做。他可能会宣布一些与此相关的事情。他宣布了吗？” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049576600895684746/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Russian oil pipeline pumping station in Perm continues to burn 18 hours after being hit by a Ukrainian drone strike. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049575807014568198/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 俄罗斯彼尔姆的一座输油管道泵站被乌克兰无人机袭击 18 小时后仍在燃烧。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049575807014568198/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel France's Jordan Bardella: "Hezbollah must be disarmed. Targeted strikes and operations by Israel can be considered legitimate. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049574874268504153/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 法国的乔丹·巴尔德拉（Jordan Bardella）：“真主党必须被解除武装。以色列的定点打击和行动可以被视为合法的。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049574874268504153/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Florida's Senate passed the 2026 DeSantis-drawn congressional map. It now heads to the governor's desk. The redistricting is projected to give Republicans up to 4 additional House seats. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049573671111418206/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 佛罗里达州参议院通过了 2026 年德桑蒂斯绘制的国会选区图。现在它将提交给州长办公室。预计此次重新划分选区将使共和党增加多达 4 个众议院席位。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049573671111418206/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Fed Chair Powell: "I've said that I will not leave the board until this investigation is well and truly over with transparency and finality and I stand by that. I'm encouraged by recent developments." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049572861631680666/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美联储主席鲍威尔：“我说过，在这次调查以透明和最终结果圆满结束之前，我不会离开董事会，我坚持这一点。我对最近的事态发展感到鼓舞。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049572861631680666/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) A burning oil refinery in the Russian city of Tuapse seen from a commercial plane flying over the Black Sea waters. The black mushroom cloud rising hundreds of meters into the air. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049572673970176315/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 从飞越黑海上空的商业飞机上可以看到俄罗斯图阿普谢市一座正在燃烧的炼油厂。黑色的蘑菇云升起数百米高。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049572673970176315/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Supreme Court struck down Louisiana's congressional map and narrowed the Voting Rights Act. Trump said he hadn't yet seen the ruling but responded "I love it" after being told it's viewed as a Republican win. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049572422928503210/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最高法院推翻了路易斯安那州的国会选区图，并缩小了《投票权法案》的范围。特朗普表示他还没有看到裁决，但在被告知这被视为共和党的胜利后，他回应说“我喜欢它”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049572422928503210/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Trump stated that Putin had been ready to make a deal a long time ago, but he thinks that some people made it difficult for him to reach one. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049571766553526589/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 特朗普表示，普京很久以前就准备好达成协议，但他认为有些人让他难以达成协议。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049571766553526589/video/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @washingtonpost : The aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford will soon leave the Middle East for repairs, according to U.S. officials, after a 10-month deployment amid the Iran war. Its departure reduces the firepower on hand as Trump presses Iran to make peace. https://wapo.st/4tGu05A tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @washingtonpost：据美国官员称，在伊朗战争期间部署 10 个月后，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（USS Gerald R. Ford）将很快离开中东进行维修。随着特朗普向伊朗施压要求和平，它的离开减少了手头的火力。 https://wapo.st/4tGu05A 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Greek authorities fired warning shots from an airgun as they approached vessels of the Global Sumud Flotilla, which is seeking to bring humanitarian aid to Gaza, according to a flotilla participant on livestream. Activists on board stated that the vessels are in international waters and called the interception illegal. One of the flotilla's vessels has been intercepted and boarded by Greek authorities. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 据船队的一名直播参与者称，希腊当局在接近全球坚韧船队（旨在向加沙运送人道主义援助）的船只时，用气枪发射了警告弹。船上的活动人士称这些船只位于国际水域，并称此次拦截是非法的。船队中的一艘船只已被希腊当局拦截并登船。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical The key Russian oil pipeline pumping station in the city of Perm continues to burn roughly 18 hours after it was hit in a Ukrainian drone raid. Seen here, the glow of the burning Russian facility on the horizon. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049567286697050431/video/1 tweet

He might announce something having to do with that. Did he announce it yet?" https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049566869795782710/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽The U.S. Attorney’s Office, Southern district of New York, unsealed an indictment charging current and former senior officials from Mexico’s Sinaloa state, including Governor Rubén Rocha Moya, with drug trafficking, corruption and related weapons offences.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 Governor of Sinaloa Rubén Rocha Moya rejected the charges laid out against him by the U.S. as lacking any truth. He described the charges as an attack on the Fourth Transformation political movement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽 美国纽约南区检察官办公室公布了一份起诉书，指控墨西哥锡那罗亚州现任和前任高级官员，包括州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚（Rubén Rocha Moya），犯有毒品贩运、腐败和相关武器罪……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 锡那罗亚州州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚拒绝了美国对他提出的指控，称其毫无事实根据。他将这些指控描述为对“第四次转型”政治运动的攻击。 @wfwitness

text: ▶ Итоги 29 апреля видеосводка от руководителя проекта @rybar Михаила Звинчука специально для @SolovievLive Ситуация в Мали по‑прежнему далека от стабилизации: после прорывов антиправительственной коалиции на севере командование делает ставку на жёсткое давление в южных и центральных районах. При поддержке Африканского Корпуса зачистки идут в Колокани и окрестностях Севаре, а на юге фактически формируют тыл для будущего реванша на севере. На африканском направлении российская сторона работает и по официальной линии: в Россию с визитом прибыл президент Республики Конго Дени Сассу-Нгессо, и формальные заявления о «перспективных направлениях сотрудничества» в экономике дополняются куда более предметным разговором о безопасности и энергетике. Тем временем, в сопредельной ДР Конго американцы и их партнёры формируют «частную» модель силового контроля за ресурсами, фактически создавая карманную армию для сопровождения потоков кобальта и меди. На этом фоне идея учредить «новую русскую Ост-Индскую компанию» перестаёт выглядеть экзотикой — как говорится, учиться нужно всегда, даже у врага. В зоне СВО российские войска развивают наступление сразу на нескольких участках. На Слобожанском направлении завершено освобождение Новодмитровки у Краснополья, одновременно идут бои за Кривую Луку и Рай-Александровку, а штурмовые подразделения ГВ «Юг» зачищают Ильиновку и продолжают вести тяжёлые бои в Константиновке и вокруг Часова Яра. Как далеко зайдёт передел влияния под прикрытием частных инициатив в Африке, зачем король Велобритании приезжал в США и что произойдёт, если ОАЭ выйдут из ОПЕК — смотрите в новом выпуске «Разборов Рыбаря — Итоги дня» . #дайджест #разбор #эфиры ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: ▶ 4月29日总结，由项目负责人 @rybar 米哈伊尔·兹温丘克（Mikhail Zvinchuk）为 @SolovievLive 特别制作的视频摘要。马里的局势仍远未稳定：在反政府联盟在北部取得突破后，指挥部正押注于南部和中部地区的强力施压。在非洲军团的支持下，清剿行动正在科洛卡尼（Kolokani）和塞瓦雷（Sevare）周边进行，而在南部，实际上正在为未来在北部的反击建立后方。在非洲方向，俄罗斯方面也通过官方渠道开展工作：刚果共和国总统德尼·萨苏-恩格索（Denis Sassou-Nguesso）抵达俄罗斯进行访问，关于经济领域“有前景的合作方向”的正式声明，辅之以关于安全和能源的更实质性的对话。与此同时，在邻国刚果民主共和国，美国及其合作伙伴正在形成一种资源控制的“私人”模式，实际上建立了一支私人军队来护送钴和铜的流动。在此背景下，建立“新俄罗斯东印度公司”的想法看起来不再那么异国情调——俗话说，学习永远是必要的，即使是向敌人学习。在特别军事行动区，俄罗斯军队正在多个地段推进。在斯洛博然斯克方向，克拉斯诺波利耶附近的诺沃德米特罗夫卡（Novodmitrovka）的解放工作已经完成，同时正在争夺克里瓦亚卢卡（Krivaya Luka）和拉伊-亚历山德罗夫卡（Ray-Aleksandrovka），而“南方”部队的突击部队正在清理伊利诺夫卡（Ilyinovka），并继续在康斯坦丁诺夫卡（Konstantinovka）和恰索夫亚尔（Chasiv Yar）周围进行艰苦的战斗。在非洲私人倡议的掩护下，势力范围的重新划分会走多远，英国国王为何访问美国，如果阿联酋退出欧佩克会发生什么——请观看新一期的“雷巴尔分析——每日总结”。 #摘要 #分析 #直播 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 The new gaza flotilla in the Ionian Sea, approximately 80‑100 nautical miles south of Kalamata, Greece, has been approached by several unidentified speedboats and a military frigate. VHF and CCTV jamming have been reported, along with a persistent drone presence over the past two hours. The vessel Bianca ITA confirmed it manoeuvred away from approaching vessels, with four speedboats remaining nearby. Unconfirmed reports suggest boarding of one of the flotilla ships. The situation is developing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 在爱奥尼亚海，距离希腊卡拉马塔以南约 80-100 海里的新加沙船队遭到几艘身份不明的快艇和一艘军用护卫舰的靠近。据报道，甚高频（VHF）和闭路电视（CCTV）受到干扰，过去两小时内无人机持续存在。Bianca ITA 号船只证实其已机动避开靠近的船只，仍有四艘快艇在附近。未经证实的报告称船队中的一艘船只已被登船。局势正在发展中。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 The U.S. Attorney’s Office, Southern district of New York, unsealed an indictment charging current and former senior officials from Mexico’s Sinaloa state, including Governor Rubén Rocha Moya, with drug trafficking, corruption and related weapons offences. The U.S. Justice Department alleged the defendants conspired with leaders of the Sinaloa Cartel to import massive quantities of fentanyl, heroin, cocaine and methamphetamine into the United States in exchange for bribes and political support. Prosecutors further alleged Rocha Moya was elected governor with support from the Chapitos faction of the cartel, which they say intimidated rivals and later received protection in return. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 美国纽约南区检察官办公室公布了一份起诉书，指控墨西哥锡那罗亚州现任和前任高级官员，包括州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚（Rubén Rocha Moya），犯有毒品贩运、腐败和相关武器罪。美国司法部指控被告与锡那罗亚贩毒集团的领导人合谋，向美国输入大量芬太尼、海洛因、可卡因和甲基苯丙胺，以换取贿赂和政治支持。检察官进一步指控罗查·莫亚在贩毒集团 Chapitos 派系的支持下当选州长，他们称该派系恐吓竞争对手，并随后获得保护作为回报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraqi President Nizar Amidi has officially tasked Ali al‑Zaidi, the nominee of the Shiite Coordination Framework, with forming the next government. Iraqi Parliament Speaker Mohammed al‑Halbousi praised the framework’s commitment to constitutional timelines.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Shafaq : Iraq’s prime minister‑designate, Ali al‑Zaidi, is forming a new government based on parliamentary weight. A preliminary cabinet map has emerged, with allocations shaped by election results and proposals during formation talks. Caretaker Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani’s Reconstruction and Development coalition (46 seats) is expected to secure the Finance Ministry and a deputy prime minister post – the largest share. Within the Shiite Coordination Framework (162 seats), Nouri al‑Maliki’s State of Law coalition (29 seats) is likely to take the Oil Ministry and another service portfolio. The Badr Organisation (18 seats) is expected to take the Interior Ministry. The Planning Ministry is projected to go to Ammar al‑Hakim’s National Wisdom Movement (18 seats). The Electricity Ministry may go to the Virtue Party, and Education to the Services Alliance (5‑9 seats). The Supreme Islamic Council (4 seats) is set to receive Youth and Sports, while the Sadiqoun Movement (27 seats) is expected to obtain Labour, Industry, and a deputy premiership. Among Sunni blocs, Taqaddum (27 seats) is set to receive Higher Education, and the Al‑Azm Alliance (15 seats) the Defence Ministry. The KDP (26 seats) is expected to take Foreign Affairs and Justice; the PUK (15 seats) Health and Environment, and Culture, Tourism and Antiquities. Al‑Zaidi has formed two teams – one for a government programme and one for selecting ministers. He has 30 days to secure parliamentary confidence under Article 76 of the constitution. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克总统尼扎尔·阿米迪（Nizar Amidi）已正式委任什叶派协调框架提名的阿里·扎伊迪（Ali al‑Zaidi）组建下一届政府。伊拉克议会议长穆罕默德·哈尔布西（Mohammed al‑Halbousi）称赞了该框架对宪法时间表的承诺……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Shafaq：伊拉克候任总理阿里·扎伊迪正根据议会权重组建新政府。初步的内阁蓝图已经浮现，其分配方案由选举结果和组阁谈判中的提议决定。看守总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani）的“重建与发展”联盟（46席）预计将获得财政部和一个副总理职位，这是最大的份额。在什叶派协调框架（162席）内部，努里·马利基（Nouri al‑Maliki）的“法治国家”联盟（29席）很可能获得石油部和另一个服务类部门。巴德尔组织（18席）预计将获得内政部。计划部预计将由阿马尔·哈基姆（Ammar al‑Hakim）的“国家智慧运动”（18席）获得。电力部可能归属美德党（Virtue Party），教育部归属服务联盟（5‑9席）。最高伊斯兰委员会（4席）将获得青年与体育部，而萨迪昆运动（Sadiqoun Movement，27席）预计将获得劳工部、工业部和一个副总理职位。在逊尼派阵营中，“进步”联盟（Taqaddum，27席）将获得高等教育部，“决心”联盟（Al‑Azm Alliance，15席）将获得国防部。库尔德斯坦民主党（KDP，26席）预计将获得外交部和司法部；库尔德斯坦爱国联盟（PUK，15席）将获得卫生与环境部，以及文化、旅游与文物部。扎伊迪已组建了两个团队——一个负责政府纲领，另一个负责挑选部长。根据宪法第76条，他有30天的时间来争取议会的信任。@wfwitness

text: Putin meets with Kadyrov at the Kremlin.
text_zh: 普京在克里姆林宫会见卡德罗夫。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 Iran’s UN mission said that all of Iran’s enriched uranium has always been under full IAEA supervision, with no report of even one gram being diverted. The U.S. exploited the NPT Review Conference to portray Iran’s enriched uranium as a danger, in order to divert attention from its own violations and those of its allies in nuclear disarmament. The mission added that the UN Security Council, the IAEA Director‑General and the Board of Governors not only failed to condemn illegal attacks, but most regrettably took actions that reversed the roles of victim and aggressor. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 伊朗驻联合国代表团表示，伊朗所有的浓缩铀一直都在国际原子能机构（IAEA）的全面监督之下，没有任何一克被挪用的报告。美国利用《不扩散核武器条约》（NPT）审议大会将伊朗的浓缩铀描绘成一种危险，旨在转移对其自身及其盟友在核裁军方面违规行为的注意力。代表团补充说，联合国安理会、国际原子能机构总干事和理事会不仅未能谴责非法袭击，而且最令人遗憾的是，他们采取了颠倒受害者和侵略者角色的行动。@wfwitness

text: Faytuks News The rest of Iran's missile-making facilities could be destroyed 'very quickly' if "we don't make a deal", Trump says https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hLYFGv9ktM tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 特朗普称，如果我们“不达成协议”，伊朗剩余的导弹制造设施可能会“非常迅速”地被摧毁 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hLYFGv9ktM 推文

text: France's Jordan Bardella: I do want the fall of the Iranian regime — but should we send French soldiers or European soldiers onto Iranian soil? I do not think so.
text_zh: 法国的乔丹·巴尔德拉（Jordan Bardella）：我确实希望伊朗政权倒台——但我们应该派遣法国士兵或欧洲士兵进入伊朗领土吗？我不这么认为。
